name: multiportal-listing-manager
description: MultiPortal Listing Manager — create listing drafts once and publish across multiple marketplace platforms

scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @multiportal/config run lint && pnpm --filter @multiportal/shared run lint && pnpm --filter @multiportal/connectors run lint && pnpm --filter @multiportal/api run lint && pnpm --filter @multiportal/web run lint && pnpm --filter @multiportal/worker run lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @multiportal/config run test && pnpm --filter @multiportal/shared run test && pnpm --filter @multiportal/connectors run test && pnpm --filter @multiportal/api run test && pnpm --filter @multiportal/web run test && pnpm --filter @multiportal/worker run test
